projectDescription: TypeScript utilities for Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) enabling local Ollama models and streaming agent interactions
keyFeatures: OllamaModel - Custom BaseLlm implementation for local and cloud-hosted Ollama models
GenAIAgentService - Modular service for agent interactions with native streaming and SSE support
MockModel - Testing implementation for development without API costs or dependencies
Tool calling support for LLM function execution
Seamless integration with Vercel AI SDK and Google GenAI ecosystem
publicApiSurface: OllamaModel class - Custom LLM provider for Ollama models (local/cloud)
GenAIAgentService class - Streaming agent service with message validation and SSE formatting
MockModel class - Mock LLM implementation for testing with configurable delays and responses
